entries.description: Restructured transportProfileBlockHtml + verificationModeBlockHtml to shared optionRowHtml row layout (radio | name | desc), copy constants split at em-dash for presentation only
Added .gs-option-row grid CSS with theme-variable row separation to tree.css
Updated S4 copy-pin + transport copy assertions to assert same literal strings across the split structure; added Set 080 S1 option-row suite (6 tests)
Layer-2 mocha suite 1250 passing; esbuild compile + tsc clean
Layer-3 Playwright smoke: 18/19 passed; single ARIA-tree failure was a palette-open timeout flake, passed clean on isolated re-run (19/19 effective)
routed_gate verdict SKIP (exit 10): 3 files, 1 module, no coupling triggers; per Set 068 DEMOTE the per-session routed verification is bypassed; no raise-only flags apply

Authored 080-getting-started-subchoice-legibility-uat-checklist.json to the Set 078/079 bar: 3 walks / 5 items (Full-group rows + judgment, Lightweight-group rows + judgment, whole-row selection + reload persistence). Every literal string re-grounded against current gettingStartedHtml.js/tree.css during authoring (programmatic string-match sweep: 10/10 found in both source and checklist); every cited Layer-2 suite re-run fresh during authoring: Set 080 S1 6/6, Set 079 S1 20/20, verification-mode block 5/5, restoreGsState 26/26. Ad-hoc floor validated programmatically: 3 functional items all carry ProgrammaticVerification, 2 judgment items flagged IsJudgmentItem with justification.

Built local VSIX for the operator walk (Set 058 lesson: locally built only): npx vsce package -> tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.35.0.vsix (36 files, 1.08 MB, built 2026-07-05 16:26 from master with the S1 row layout; version string still 0.35.0 - the 0.36.0 bump lands at the release step after UAT).

Operator walked the UAT checklist (judgment items + all functional items PASS except Walk 1 functional checkbox, recorded false with no feedback - operator confirmation requested in chat) and captured the refreshed getting-started.png (42755 -> 80441 bytes), staged for commit.

Release prep: package.json 0.35.0 -> 0.36.0, CHANGELOG 0.36.0 entry (extension-only, presentation-only), repository-reference release-status row + version-walk entry (publish state recorded honestly as tag-push-held). Full Layer-2 suite fresh: 1250 passing; tsc clean; vsce package clean. Tag push held for operator confirmation + authorization.

routed_gate verdict REQUIRED (exit 0): 8 files, modules {docs, tools}, triggers blast-radius/multi-module/breadth/build-ci-config (package.json) - as predicted at S1 close; cross-provider session-verification run per Set 068 DEMOTE policy.

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, openai): Round 1 returned one unlabeled-severity finding (S080-S2-V1-001: repository-reference UAT-closure overclaim vs the Walk 1 false checkbox) - treated as blocking per L-071-1 anti-laundering; wording remediated, echoes swept per L-065-1, structured finding persisted to s2-issues.json. Round 2 (narrow re-verify, same tier, no max_tier pin per L-064-7) returned VERIFIED. Raw outputs: s2-verification.md, s2-verification-round-2.md.

Operator attested UAT clean via chat (the Walk 1 functional checkbox was an accidental unchecked box: 'The UAT is clean. I just didn't check everything'); Passes flipped with a resolution note per the Set 079 chat-attestation precedent, repository-reference echo updated (S080-S2-V1-001 fully resolved). Operator also authorized the release flow and requested follow-up Set 081 (budget input scoped/conditional to the Direct provider API keys sub-choice).
